execution_summary: Epic 1 (Group Creation & Invitations) will be built as native SwiftUI screens with Core Data persistence. This foundational epic enables users to create private groups with required names and optional images/descriptions, generate secure invitation links with 24-hour expiration, and join multiple groups (max 20 per user). The implementation prioritizes HIG compliance with 44pt touch targets, safe area respect, and accessibility support to establish quality baseline for subsequent features.
milestones: Create native iOS Xcode project structure with SwiftUI and Core Data setup
Implement Group model with required name field and optional image/description fields
Build group creation form screen with proper text input validation and image picker integration
Implement secure invitation link generation system with 24-hour expiration logic
Create invitation acceptance flow with link/code validation and group joining
Add group membership management with 20-group limit and creator permissions
Ensure HIG compliance across all screens with safe areas, touch targets, and accessibility labels
Complete QA validation with screenshot review and native iOS testing

ui: GroupCreationView.swift - Main group creation form with name input, image picker, description field
InvitationView.swift - Display and share invitation links/codes with proper formatting
GroupJoinView.swift - Handle invitation acceptance flow and validation feedback
logic: Group.swift - Core Data model with validation rules and membership limits
InvitationManager.swift - Secure link generation, expiration handling, and validation
GroupService.swift - CRUD operations, membership management, and creator permissions
qa: HIG compliance audit for 44pt touch targets and safe area handling
Screenshot review for dark mode, Dynamic Type, and contrast validation
Native iOS testing for form validation, image picker, and navigation flows

merge_strategy: Sequential milestone completion with UI screens depending on completed data models. Each milestone requires passing HIG audit before proceeding to next. Final integration testing only after all components pass individual QA.
feedback_loop: Each completed milestone triggers screenshot review and HIG audit. Any HIG failures block progression to next milestone. Final epic completion requires native iOS evidence from Xcode simulator demonstrating full group creation and invitation flow.
